title: Konductor Install Run Sheet
note: Definition of the install procedure (source of truth for the checklist UI). Per-store checkbox STATE is NOT stored here -- it lives in Firestore, keyed by store_id + step id. This file defines WHAT the steps are; Firestore tracks WHICH are done, by whom, when.
tentative_marker: ??? in the original notes = step Joey was unsure about; rendered as TENTATIVE, confirm before relying on it.

steps.label: Call store re: lockbox and codes
Call store re: closing-procedure ETA — store lets the tech know when they are completely done with Toast and their closing procedures
Get maps for the restaurant networks and IP
Wait for c1 to greenlight (inventory check + manager done with closing)
Move all non-POS ports to VLAN 90
Rename all devices in Meraki to what they actually are
steps.note: Name each device to its true role/location identity, not Meraki defaults.

steps.label: Set up DHCP override (reservation) by MAC address for the wireless HerdServe device
steps.note: HerdServe is wireless -- pin its IP via MAC reservation so it stays consistent.
